title: Thindal Murugan Temple
tagline: Thindal Murugan Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Arulmigu Velayuthaswamy Thirukovil, also known as the Thindalmalai Murugan Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Murugan, located on Thindalmalai hillock near Erode, Tamil Na
overview.description: Arulmigu Velayuthaswamy Thirukovil, also known as the Thindalmalai Murugan Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Murugan, located on Thindalmalai hillock near Erode, Tamil Nadu, India. The primary deity is Sri Velayudhaswami (Murugan). The temple houses a golden chariot Temple Car, used to carry images of gods in ceremonial processions. It is about 7 km from Central Bus stand at Swastik Circle, 8 km from Erode Junction.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Thindal, Erode
topPlaces.description: Thindal is a neighborhood in the city of Erode Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 8 km from Erode Junction and 7 km from Central Bus Terminus, Erode.

topPlaces.name: Bharathi Vidya Bhavan
topPlaces.description: Bharathi Vidya Bhavan is a co-educational residential senior secondary school in Erode in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It was founded in 1978.

topPlaces.name: Nanjanapuram
topPlaces.description: Nanjanapuram is a Village Panchayat located in Erode district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This Village Panchayat is located in the periphery of Erode Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Pavalathampalayam
topPlaces.description: Pavalathampalayam or Pagalathampalayam is a neighbourhood in Erode district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. Pavalathampalayam is located at an altitude of about 246 m above the mean sea level with the geographical coordinates of 11.301700°N 77.660750°E / 11.301700; 77.660750 (i.e., 11°18'06.1"N, 77°39'38.7"E).

topPlaces.name: Villarasampatti
topPlaces.description: Villarasampatti is a neighbourhood in the city of Erode, Tamil Nadu. It functioned as an independent Village Panchayat until the corporation expansion in 2011.

topPlaces.name: Kathirampatti
topPlaces.description: Kathirampatti is a Village Panchayat in Erode district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This Village Panchayat include villages namely Kathirampatti, Nanjanapuram, Pavalathampalayam & Chinna Medu.

topPlaces.name: Muthampalayam
topPlaces.description: Muthampalayam is a neighbourhood locality in Erode city in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It was a village panchayat till 2011.

topPlaces.name: Surampatti
topPlaces.description: Surampatti is a neighbourhood locality in the city of Erode, Tamil Nadu in India. And presently, this has been converted as the Zonal Headquarters for one of the four zones of Erode Municipal Corporation, combining 15 Wards.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thindal Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thindal Murugan Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thindal Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (76 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (85 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thindal Murugan Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thindal Murugan Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thindal Murugan Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thindal Murugan Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thindal Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thindal, Erode, Bharathi Vidya Bhavan, Nanjanapuram, Pavalathampalayam, Villarasampatti.
